description: has operator for attribute existence check

tests.name: has_context_attr_true
tests.description: context has debug_mode should be true when attr exists
tests.policy: permit (principal, action, resource) when { context has debug_mode };

tests.name: has_context_attr_false
tests.description: context has debug_mode should be false when attr missing
tests.policy: permit (principal, action, resource) when { context has debug_mode };

tests.name: has_principal_attr_true
tests.description: principal has email should be true when principal_attrs contains email
tests.policy: permit (principal, action, resource) when { principal has email };

tests.name: has_principal_attr_false
tests.description: principal has phone should be false when not in principal_attrs
tests.policy: permit (principal, action, resource) when { principal has phone };

tests.name: has_with_attr_access
tests.description: has guard followed by attribute access: principal has role && principal.role == admin
tests.policy: permit (principal, action, resource) when { principal has role && principal.role == "admin" };

tests.name: has_with_attr_access_wrong_value
tests.description: has true but attr value does not match
tests.policy: permit (principal, action, resource) when { principal has role && principal.role == "admin" };

tests.name: has_resource_attr
tests.description: resource has classification
tests.policy: forbid (principal, action, resource) when { resource has classified && resource.classified == true };

tests.name: has_in_forbid_missing
tests.description: forbid with has on missing attr does not apply
tests.policy:
permit (principal, action, resource);
forbid (principal, action, resource) when { resource has classified && resource.classified == true };

tests.name: has_empty_context
tests.description: has on context with no context attrs should be false
tests.policy: permit (principal, action, resource) when { context has token };

tests.name: has_negated
tests.description: negated has: !(principal has banned)
tests.policy: permit (principal, action, resource) when { !(principal has banned) };

tests.name: has_action_attr_true
tests.description: action has level should be true when action_attrs contains level
tests.policy: permit (principal, action, resource) when { action has level && action.level == "read" };

tests.name: has_action_attr_false
tests.description: action has level should be false when action_attrs missing level
tests.policy: permit (principal, action, resource) when { action has level };

tests.name: has_in_unless_clause
tests.description: unless clause with has: deny when principal has banned
tests.policy: permit (principal, action, resource) unless { principal has banned };

tests.name: has_in_unless_clause_missing
tests.description: unless clause with has on missing attr allows
tests.policy: permit (principal, action, resource) unless { principal has banned };

tests.name: has_with_or_operator
tests.description: has combined with || operator
tests.policy: permit (principal, action, resource) when { principal has admin || context has override };

tests.name: has_string_attr_true
tests.description: has with string literal should match existing attr
tests.policy: permit (principal, action, resource) when { context has "debug_mode" };

tests.name: has_string_attr_false
tests.description: has with string literal should be false when attr missing
tests.policy: permit (principal, action, resource) when { context has "missing" };

tests.name: has_string_hyphenated_attr
tests.description: has with hyphenated string attr name (existence check only)
tests.policy: permit (principal, action, resource) when { context has "content-type" };

tests.name: has_followed_by_integer
tests.description: has followed by integer literal should fail to parse
tests.policy: permit (principal, action, resource) when { context has 42 };

tests.name: has_followed_by_keyword
tests.description: has followed by keyword (true) should fail to parse
tests.policy: permit (principal, action, resource) when { context has true };

tests.name: has_principal_no_attrs
tests.description: has on principal when principal_attrs not provided should be false
tests.policy: permit (principal, action, resource) when { principal has role };

tests.name: has_guard_prevents_attr_error
tests.description: has guard false should short-circuit && and prevent attr access error
tests.policy: permit (principal, action, resource) when { principal has role && principal.role == "admin" };

tests.name: has_chained_and
tests.description: chained has with &&: principal has role && principal has dept
tests.policy: permit (principal, action, resource) when { principal has role && principal has dept };

tests.name: has_chained_and_partial
tests.description: chained has with && where only one attr exists should deny
tests.policy: permit (principal, action, resource) when { principal has role && principal has dept };
